name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the microfrontend?

serverURL.description: The url of the backend portal server.

generatePublicPortal.description: If yes, a public portal component will be generated.
generatePublicPortal.x-prompt: Would you like me to generate a public portal component?

generatePrivatePortal.description: If yes, a private portal component will be generated.
generatePrivatePortal.x-prompt: Would you like me to generate a private portal component?

directory.description: The directory of the new application.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory should the application be created in? (leave blank for default)

style.description: The file extension to be used for style files.

x-prompt.message: Which stylesheet format would you like to use?

inlineStyle.description: Specifies if the style will be in the ts file.
inlineStyle.x-prompt: Should styles be inlined in the component .ts file?

inlineTemplate.description: Specifies if the template will be in the ts file.
inlineTemplate.x-prompt: Should the template be inlined in the component .ts file?

x-prompt.message: Which view encapsulation strategy would you like to use?

prefix.description: The prefix to apply to generated selectors.
prefix.x-prompt: What prefix would you like to use for generated selectors? (e.g. app)

unitTestRunner.description: Test runner to use for unit tests.

x-prompt.message: Which unit test runner would you like to use?

e2eTestRunner.description: Test runner to use for end to end (E2E) tests.
e2eTestRunner.x-prompt: Which E2E test runner would you like to use?

tags.description: Add tags to the application (used for linting).
tags.x-prompt: Add tags to the application for linting (comma-separated, leave blank for none)

linter.description: The tool to use for running lint checks.

x-prompt.message: Which linter would you like to use?

strict.description: Create an application with stricter type checking and build optimization options.
strict.x-prompt: Enable strict type checking and build optimizations?

port.description: The port at which the remote application should be served.
port.x-prompt: Which port should the remote application be served on? (leave blank for default)

setParserOptionsProject.description: Whether or not to configure the ESLint `parserOptions.project` option. We do not do this by default for lint performance reasons.
setParserOptionsProject.x-prompt: Configure ESLint parserOptions.project? (not recommended — impacts lint performance)

rootProject.description: Create an application at the root of the workspace.
